source.scope: Official-source-backed Egypt calendar-year 2026 Article 8 individual income-tax matrix.

EG.notes: Article 8 income-dependent matrix with 0%, 10%, 15%, 20%, 22.5%, 25% and 27.5% rates and statutory EGP 10 income flooring. Exemption and deduction derivation, payroll administration, separate regimes and credits remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 Article 8 annual individual income tax on caller-confirmed net taxable income.
